questions.question: Under what clause is homie protected if he gets in an accident and goes to the hospital?
answers: Medical Payments and Personal Injury Protection

questions.question: What other kinds of insurance fall under Auto-Owners Insurances' Multi-Policy Discount?
What happens if you get in an accident with another vehicle insured by Auto-Owners?
answers: The driver most at fault pays the other's collision deductable
This depends on the specific policies both drivers have

questions.question: What happens after your first at-fault crash with Auto-Owners?
answers: You will only have to pay half of your accident surcharge
You will no longer be insured by Auto-Owners
You will have to pay just an accident surcharge
